feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Damian Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,529Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Birthday Gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,708Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 54

Summary: Damian's eighteenth birthday is a pretty quiet affair. Just family, a couple of his friends from school, a couple of his super friends. Dick drives up from Bludhaven with a gift. All through dinner, through cake and gifts, all eyes are on Damian. His family's more than others. Bruce watches him with a hooded gaze. Jason like a cat watching a mouse. Tim hovers close, hungry. But Damian gravitates toward Dick. Lets Dick ruffle his hair and pull him against his side and kiss his cheek. None of the other guests think anything of it. Dick's always been open with his affection. Damian tolerates it. So when the party is over and the guests leave, it's Dick he lets trail after him to his bedroom._____Damian is eighteen. Dick has been waiting a long time.

entry.title: Shadows of Desire
entry.summary:
Author: c0ca1ne_sunday

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,530Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 22

Summary: Damian Wayne is living with his father and the Bat-Family, everything was going perfectly. Until one day during training, things get a little too intimate with his adopted brother Dick – who, in Damian's humble opinion, is an idiot, but a hot idiot.These thoughts triggered a series of confusing feelings, new sensations, and self-discovery for the younger boy.Or, Damian is falling for Dick while wanting to slip his hand down his pants.

entry.title: It’s Not a Kink (I Swear)
entry.summary:
Author: Whyyyyyyyyfcky

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,044Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 319

Summary: It was supposed to be a harmless wager. A joke. A moment to tease and move on. But something shifts. The air grows heavier, the silences longer. And somewhere in the shadows of the Batcave, under the weight of old fabric and older memories, a line is crossed—and nothing feels quite the same again.

entry.title: Batcest: Dick is a Slut
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,025Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: Dick and Jason get freaky in an alley, Jason calls him a slut and when some dudes see them they make Dick feel worse.After a bad night on patrol, he just wants to take a shower and get in bed with his other lovers: Tim and Damian, but they ALSO call him a slut and that's IT.He gets into a vicious fight with Jason and only Alfred's insight saves them from making more mistakes.Cue in: Dick's family and lovers comforting him, begging for forgiveness and talking about it. Gut-wrenching stuff here, so sorry Dick and Jason.Warning: underage because Tim and Damian are still minors.

entry.title: Batcest Time: Revenge
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,125Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 37

Summary: Jason breaks when Damian asks him to be fucked with a crowbar. Sure, it was in the heat of the moment, but then he just left Damian there, barely staying in the house for days, barely speaking... And Damian finds out Jason was raped and beaten by Joker before dying. After being being attacked by mistake by Jason, he convinces his older brother to tell the rest of the family about what happened.   A few days later, Dick and Damian are caught in the act by Slade. Damian has an idea... why don't they ask him to bring someone back from the dead so they can make them pay?

entry.title: The Night Before Valentine’s
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleyGlitterShitter

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,294Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: — 4:00 PM, February 13th — Gotham City — In the highest office of Wayne Enterprises, Bruce Wayne had just signed the final contract. The ink hadn’t even dried yet then the door burst open. Damian Wayne strode in, green eyes blazing with a determination that bordered on arrogance. He slammed his palm against the black oak desk. “Father. I am going to propose to Richard.” The silence swallowed the room. Damian had said he would propose to Dick. It wasn’t a question. It was a declaration. A declaration of war.

entry.title: The Demon's obsession
entry.summary:
Author: Kaat30

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,128Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 333

Summary: Damian al Ghul became the Demon's head when he was 19 years old. He deemed Ra's and Talia unfit to rule the League of Assassins and disposed of them, starting a new era for the league with a ruthless leader at its head. Where Ra's had an obsession with Tim Drake, and Talia had an obsession with Bruce Wayne, Damian has his own obsession with a member of the Batfamily. Now Damian is 26 years old and on his way to Gotham to finally take what belongs to him, or rather, whom.

entry.title: Rain
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,138Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: Damian doesn’t move, only lifts his eyes. His voice is low and even: “You’re forty-seven minutes late, Richard.” “Call me Dick.” Dick steps forward, drops to one knee on the mat, and leans in close until their breaths almost touch. “You know I hate being called by my full name—especially by you.” Damian finally moves. He reaches out, grips Dick’s jaw in one hand, thumb pressing hard against his lips, voice carrying clear command: “Then prove to me how much you hate it.”

entry.title: In the Name of the Father
entry.summary:
Author: noctstate

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,602Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: Like a particularly annoying fly, Damian finally grabs onto Dick, hand circling the back of his neck, his fingers come just shy of touching at the front. The flitting around, the buzz of his never-ending string of consciousness, straight from brain to mouth, unfiltered. He just wants to finish cataloguing the evidence of their recent cases. A moment of silence. “Hey, come on, let—” His plea cuts short with the thud of the side of his face connecting with the metal of the Batcomputer’s desk. Damian holds him there, keeps his hand wrapped around the boy’s throat. He doesn’t squeeze or attempt to restrict his breathing, he just wants to make a point. Sometimes that takes a little more force, and this annoying behavior has been going on long enough.
